## **Part 1: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**

This is the core Q&A knowledge base for the support bot and users.

*   **Q: I forgot my password, how do I reset it?**
    *   **A:** No panic, happens to everyone 😅\nHere’s how you can reset it in under a minute:\n[Go to Sign-in Page](https://writeupportalos.netlify.app/#/auth)\n\n👉 Click “Forgot password?” under the password field.\n📧 Enter your email → hit Send Reset Link.\n📬 Open your inbox → click the link → create a new password.\n💡 Tip: Didn’t get the email? Check your Spam or Promotions folder.
*   **Q: How do I create a new account?**
    *   **A:** ✨ Super simple setup:\n\nHead to the [Sign-up Page](https://writeupportalos.netlify.app/#/auth).\n\nClick Sign Up → fill your name, email, and password.\n\nYou’ll get a verification email — click Verify Email to activate your account.\n🎉 You’re in!
*   **Q: I'm not receiving the verification email.**
    *   **A:** 📩 Sometimes it hides — try this:\n\nCheck Spam, Junk, or Promotions folders.\n\nStill missing? Go back to the Verify Email screen and tap Resend Link.\n🔁 Boom — a fresh one’s sent.
*   **Q: My login link expired, what do I do?**
    *   **A:** ⏳ These links are time-limited for your safety.\nJust restart the process:\n\nForgot Password → [Reset here](https://writeupportalos.netlify.app/#/auth).\n\nFor 2FA / Magic link → request a new one or use another backup code.\n✅ You’ll get a new link instantly.
*   **Q: Can I change my email address?**
    *   **A:** Of course 🧩\n⚙️ Go to **Settings > Account**\n✏️ Enter your new email → confirm via link sent to that inbox.\n🔒 You’ll need to verify your password for extra security.
*   **Q: How do I change my profile picture?**
    *   **A:** 📷 Go to **Settings > Profile**\nHover over your current photo → click Change → upload a new pic.\n💅 Keep it sharp — it’s your first impression!
*   **Q: How do I edit my portfolio?**
    *   **A:** 💼 Open the **Portfolio App** → click **Edit Portfolio**.\nThere you can update:\n\n🧠 Bio & tagline\n\n⚒️ Skills & experience\n\n✨ “What I Do” section\n🎯 Hit save — it updates instantly!

    *   **A:** 🔐 Go to **Settings > Account > Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)**.\nClick **View Codes** → enter your password to unlock them.\n💾 Save these codes somewhere safe (notes app or password manager).
*   **Q: How do I set up the Kali Linux connection?**
    *   **A:** 🖥️ To connect your local Kali instance:\n1. In Kali terminal, run: \`vncserver :1 -geometry 1280x720\` followed by \`websockify -D --web=/usr/share/novnc 6080 0.0.0.0:5901\`.\n2. Start an Ngrok tunnel: \`ngrok http 6080\`.\n3. Copy the **HTTPS** URL from Ngrok and paste it into the **Kali App** in the dashboard.\n🚀 You're now controlling Kali from your browser!
*   **Q: Why is my Kali connection refused?**
    *   **A:** ❌ This usually happens if \`websockify\` isn't running or the Ngrok URL is incorrect. Make sure you are using the **HTTPS** version of the Ngrok link. Check the **Setup Guide** inside the Kali App for the exact commands.

## **Part 2: Technical Documentation (Platform Manual)**

This section contains the full technical documentation for the HtWtH OS.

### **1. Introduction to HtWtH OS**

*   **1.1 Mission Philosophy:** In an era where cybersecurity workflows are fragmented across dozens of disparate tools—note-taking apps, terminal emulators, report generators, and community forums—HtWtH aims to unify the hacker's ecosystem into a single, cohesive "Glass Pane." Our mission is to reduce context switching, streamline the vulnerability reporting lifecycle, and foster a real-time collaborative environment. The subsystem architecture relies on a non-blocking I/O model to handle concurrent WebSocket connections. This ensures that the event loop remains unblocked during high-latency operations, such as cryptographic handshakes or database transactions. The kernel scheduler allocates time slices based on process priority, utilizing a round-robin algorithm with multilevel feedback queues to optimize throughput for interactive applications. Data persistence is managed through an ACID-compliant transactional layer. Write-ahead logging (WAL) is employed to guarantee data integrity in the event of a system failure. The storage engine utilizes a B-Tree indexing structure for efficient retrieval of metadata, while binary large objects (BLOBs) are offloaded to an object storage service with eventual consistency guarantees.
*   **1.2 Architecture Overview:** HtWtH allows for a persistence-heavy, stateful experience within a stateless web environment. It utilizes a micro-kernel architecture simulated within the React Virtual DOM.
    *   **Frontend Core:** Built on React 18+ with TypeScript, utilizing a custom-built Window Manager engine that simulates a full desktop environment with Z-index stacking contexts and memory management.
    *   **State Management:** Complex state synchronization logic bridging local session storage with Supabase Realtime for "hot-swapping" user sessions without data loss.
    *   **Identity Federation:** A hybrid authentication system leveraging Firebase Auth for secure credential management and Supabase RLS for granular row-level data access control.

### **2. The Interface & Window Manager**

*   **2.1 The Virtual DOM Window Manager:** Unlike traditional single-page applications (SPAs) that route users between distinct pages, HtWtH utilizes a virtual DOM-based window manager. This is the heart of the OS simulation. It includes a multi-tasking engine where each app runs in its own React Context sandbox, preventing state pollution. Application state is preserved even when minimized.
*   **2.2 The Taskbar / Dock Architecture:** The taskbar or dock is the primary navigation and process management interface. Its position can be configured in settings.

### **3. System Kernel & Logic**

*   **3.1 Process Scheduler:** At the core of HtWtH lies a lightweight, virtualized kernel responsible for process scheduling, memory management (state), and inter-process communication (IPC). The scheduler handles application lifecycle events like `open`, `close`, `minimize`, and `focus`.
*   **3.2 Virtual Memory Management:** While constrained by the browser's Javascript heap, the OS implements a custom memory manager for application state, using a custom garbage collection logic when the heap limit is approached.

### **4. Writeup Engine**

*   **4.1 Markdown Parsing Engine:** The editor supports Github Flavored Markdown (GFM). The parsing is handled client-side to ensure zero latency.
*   **4.2 AI Analysis (Gemini Integration):** Clicking "Analyze with AI" triggers a serverless function that sends report content to Google's Gemini Flash model to determine severity (CVSS-aligned) and generate relevant tags (e.g., 'XSS', 'IDOR').

### **5. Kali Linux Integration**

*   **5.1 Technical Architecture:** The Kali App provides remote desktop access to a Kali Linux instance via a VNC-over-WebSockets connection. The architecture is: `[Browser (noVNC)] <--> [WSS Protocol] <--> [Ngrok Tunnel] <--> [Local Websockify] <--> [VNC Server (Kali)]`.
*   **5.2 Configuration Parameters:** The app accepts a custom Ngrok URL and internally forces security and performance parameters such as `encrypt=1` (force SSL/TLS), adaptive quality, and client-side scaling.

### **6. Network Protocols**

*   **6.1 WebSocket Protocol:** Used for real-time features like Community Chat and Live Activity feeds, managed through Supabase Realtime.
*   **6.2 API Rate Limiting:** The backend API implements a token bucket algorithm to prevent abuse and denial-of-service attacks.

### **7. Security Infrastructure**

*   **7.1 Two-Factor Authentication (2FA):** A custom, backup-code-centric flow. Backup codes are stored hashed in the database. A secure, time-limited magic link can be sent via email as a fallback.
*   **7.2 Privacy Modes:** Users can toggle "Private Profile" mode. Public profiles are visible to all authenticated users. Private profiles are only visible to friends, enforced via SQL filtering (RLS).

### **8. Database Architecture**

*   **8.1 User Schema:** The system uses a PostgreSQL database managed by Supabase. Key tables include `public.users`, `public.posts`, `public.chat_messages`, etc.
*   **8.2 RLS Policies:** Row Level Security (RLS) is the primary defense mechanism. For example, policies ensure users can only view their own private data (`auth.uid() = id`).

### **9. Social & Collaboration**

*   **9.1 Real-time Chat:** Utilizes Supabase Realtime subscriptions. Features include emoji reactions (stored in JSONB columns) and contextual replies.
*   **9.2 Friend System:** A bi-directional relationship model stored in adjacency arrays (`friends`, `friend_requests` columns). A global notification system alerts users to new requests.

### **10. Resource Hub**

*   **10.1 Premium Payloads:** A curated list of advanced exploit payloads. Admins can toggle visibility for all users. Non-admin users see locked/blurred cards for hidden content.
*   **10.2 Open Source Index:** A maintained index of essential external tools like GTFOBins, PayloadsAllTheThings, CyberChef, and Shodan.

### **11. Administration**

*   **11.1 User Management:** The Admin Panel provides a "God View" for users with `role: 'admin'`. Admins can approve 'Pending' users, grant/revoke 'Writeup Access' and 'Doc Access', and perform emergency resets of 2FA codes.
*   **11.2 Live Monitoring & Broadcasts:** Admins can monitor live user activity via Supabase Presence and send global notifications to all or specific users through the Broadcast Channel.

## **Part 4: Platform Features (Summary)**

*   **Smart Writeups:** A markdown editor for documenting vulnerabilities, enhanced with AI from Gemini to suggest severity and tags, streamlining the reporting process.
*   **Live Community:** A real-time chat application for users to connect, share insights, debug findings, and collaborate.
*   **Pro Portfolio:** A tool to create a professional portfolio showcasing skills, experience, and certifications, with an option to auto-generate a downloadable PDF CV.
*   **Kali Integration:** An application that allows users to connect to their remote Kali Linux instance via a secure VNC tunnel, enabling penetration testing directly from the browser.
*   **Bank-Grade Security:** The platform is secured with advanced features like Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), backup codes, and granular database permissions via Row Level Security.
*   **Resource Hub:** A curated library of premium payloads, cheat sheets, and links to essential open-source tools and learning platforms.

***

## Web Application URL Knowledge Base

**Base URL:** `https://writeupportalos.netlify.app/#/`

This is the main entry point for the application. All other paths are appended after the `/#/`.

### **Public Routes (No Login Required)**

*   **`/#/`**
    *   **Description:** The main landing page of the application. This is what new visitors see first.
*   **`/#/auth`**
    *   **Description:** The authentication page, which includes forms for signing in, signing up, and resetting a forgotten password.

### **Core Application Routes (Login Required)**

These routes are accessible after a user has successfully logged in.

*   **`/#/home`**
    *   **Description:** The main user dashboard, showing quick actions and recent activity. This is the default page after login.
*   **`/#/writeup`**
    *   **Description:** The main view for the "Writeups" application, where users can browse all published security writeups.
*   **`/#/writeup/:id`**
    *   **Description:** A direct link to view a specific writeup. The `:id` is the unique identifier of the post.
*   **`/#/blog`**
    *   **Description:** The main view for the "Blog" application, listing all articles and platform news.
*   **`/#/blog/:id`**
    *   **Description:** A direct link to read a specific blog post. The `:id` is the unique identifier of the post.
*   **`/#/chat`**
    *   **Description:** Opens the real-time "Community Chat" application for user collaboration.
*   **`/#/mywork`**
    *   **Description:** The "My Work" application, where the logged-in user can view and edit their professional portfolio.
*   **`/#/about/:email`**
    *   **Description:** A public-facing view of a specific user's portfolio. The `:email` is the email address of the user whose profile is being viewed.
*   **`/#/notes`**
    *   **Description:** The personal "Notes" application for creating and managing quick notes.
*   **`/#/todolist`**
    *   **Description:** The personal "To-Do List" application.
*   **`/#/consistency`**
    *   **Description:** The "Consistency" or "Habit Tracker" application.
*   **`/#/resources`**
    *   **Description:** The "Resource Hub," which contains both open-source links and the premium payload database.
*   **`/#/kali`**
    *   **Description:** The "Kali Linux" application for establishing a remote desktop connection.
*   **`/#/docs`**
    *   **Description:** The "Docs" application, which contains the platform's extensive technical manual.
*   **`/#/copyright`**
    *   **Description:** The "Legal" application, displaying the Terms of Service and other legal information.

### **System & Settings Routes (Login Required)**

*   **`/#/settings`**
    *   **Description:** The main "Settings" application. It defaults to the 'Profile' section.
*   **`/#/settings/:section`**
    *   **Description:** A direct link to a specific section within the settings application. Valid sections include:
        *   `profile`
        *   `appearance`
        *   `tools`
        *   `friends`
        *   `account`
*   **`/#/notifications`**
    *   **Description:** The "Notification Center" where users can view their personal alerts and notifications.
*   **`/#/search`**
    *   **Description:** The global "Search" application.
*   **`/#/search/:query`**
    *   **Description:** Opens the search application with a pre-filled search term.
*   **`/#/start`**
    *   **Description:** This path opens the "Start Menu" overlay. It's a temporary UI state rather than a permanent page.

### **Admin Routes (Admin Role Required)**

*   **`/#/admin`**
    *   **Description:** The main "Admin Dashboard" application. It defaults to the 'User Management' view.
*   **`/#/admin/:view`**
    *   **Description:** A direct link to a specific view within the admin dashboard. Valid views include:
        *   `management` (User Management)
        *   `requests` (User & Contact Requests)
        *   `live` (Live Activity Log)
        *   `broadcast` (Broadcast Message Channel)

### **Internal Authentication URLs (System Use Only)**

These URLs are part of the authentication flow and are not meant for direct user navigation.

*   **`/#/auth/verify-link?token=[TOKEN]`**
    *   **Description:** A secure, single-use link sent to a user's email for Two-Factor Authentication (2FA). The system processes the token to complete the login.

      .forms-container {
        position: absolute;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
      }

      .signin-signup {
        position: absolute;
        top: 48%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        left: 75%;
        width: 50%;
        transition: 1s 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1);
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        z-index: 6;
      }

      .signin-signup form {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        flex-direction: column;
        padding: 0 4rem;
        
        grid-column: 1 / 2;
        grid-row: 1 / 2;
        
        transition: opacity 0.4s 0.1s ease-in-out, transform 0.4s 0.1s ease-in-out;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.95);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 1;
      }
      
      form.sign-in-form {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
        pointer-events: all;
        z-index: 2;
      }
      
      .title {
        font-size: 2.2rem;
        color: #444;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      
      .dark .title {
        color: #e2e8f0; /* slate-200 */
      }
      
      .auth-input-field {
        position: relative;
        margin: 0.6rem 0;
        width: 100%;
      }
      
      .auth-input-field input {
        width: 100%;
        height: 55px;
        background: #f0f0f0;
        border: 2px solid transparent;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 0 50px 0 20px;
        font-size: 1rem;
        color: #333;
        outline: none;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
      }
      
      .dark .auth-input-field input {
        background: #334155;
        color: #e2e8f0;
      }
      
      .auth-input-field label {
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        left: 20px;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        color: #999;
        font-size: 1rem;
        pointer-events: none;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
      }
      
      .dark .auth-input-field label {
        color: #9ca3af;
      }
      
      .auth-input-field input:focus,
      .auth-input-field input:not(:placeholder-shown) {
        border-color: #667eea;
        background-color: #fff;
      }
      
      .dark .auth-input-field input:focus,
      .dark .auth-input-field input:not(:placeholder-shown) {
        background-color: #1e293b;
      }
      
      .auth-input-field input:focus + label,
      .auth-input-field input:not(:placeholder-shown) + label {
        top: 0;
        left: 15px;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        color: #667eea;
        background-color: #fff;
        padding: 0 5px;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
      }
      
      .dark .auth-input-field input:focus + label,
      .dark .auth-input-field input:not(:placeholder-shown) + label {
        background-color: #1e293b;
      }
      
      .auth-input-field svg {
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        right: 20px;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        width: 1.25rem;
        height: 1.25rem;
        color: #888;
        transition: color 0.3s ease;
      }
      
      .dark .auth-input-field svg {
        color: #9ca3af;
      }
      
      .auth-input-field input:focus ~ svg {
        color: #667eea;
      }

      /* Autofill Style Fix for Chrome/Webkit */
      input:-webkit-autofill,
      input:-webkit-autofill:hover, 
      input:-webkit-autofill:focus, 
      input:-webkit-autofill:active {
          -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 30px #f0f0f0 inset !important;
          -webkit-text-fill-color: #333 !important;
          transition: background-color 5000s ease-in-out 0s;
      }
      .dark input:-webkit-autofill,
      .dark input:-webkit-autofill:hover, 
      .dark input:-webkit-autofill:focus, 
      .dark input:-webkit-autofill:active {
          -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 30px #334155 inset !important;
          -webkit-text-fill-color: #e2e8f0 !important;
      }
      /* Adjust focused autofill background to match focus state */
      .auth-input-field input:focus:-webkit-autofill {
          -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 30px #fff inset !important;
      }
      .dark .auth-input-field input:focus:-webkit-autofill {
          -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 30px #1e293b inset !important;
      }

      .btn {
        width: 150px;
        background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #667eea, #764ba2, #667eea);
        background-size: 200% auto;
        border: none;
        outline: none;
        height: 49px;
        border-radius: 49px;
        color: #fff;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        font-weight: 600;
        margin: 10px 0;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);
      }

      .btn.btn-full {
        width: 100%;
      }

      .btn:hover {
        background-position: right center;
        transform: translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
      }
      
      .btn:active:not(:disabled) {
        transform: translateY(0px) scale(0.98);
        box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
      }
      
      .btn:disabled {
        opacity: 0.7;
        cursor: not-allowed;
      }

      .auth-footer {
        text-align: center;
        margin-top: 1rem;
        padding-top: 1rem;
        border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 380px;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        color: #aaa;
      }
      .dark .auth-footer {
        border-top-color: #475569;
        color: #777;
      }
      .auth-footer a {
        color: #888;
        font-weight: 500;
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: color 0.2s;
      }
      .dark .auth-footer a {
        color: #9ca3af;
      }
      .auth-footer a:hover {
        color: #667eea;
        text-decoration: underline;
      }

      /* Remember me & Forgot Password styles */
      .form-options {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: center;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 380px;
        margin: -5px 0 10px 0;
        font-size: 0.85rem;
      }

      .remember-me {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        color: #888;
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      .dark .remember-me {
        color: #9ca3af;
      }

      .remember-me input[type="checkbox"] {
        width: 1rem;
        height: 1rem;
        margin-right: 0.5rem;
        cursor: pointer;
        accent-color: #667eea;
      }

      .forgot-password {
        color: #667eea;
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: text-decoration 0.2s;
        background: none;
        border: none;
        padding: 0;
        font: inherit;
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      .forgot-password:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
      }

      .panels-container {
        position: absolute;
        height: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      }

      .container:before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        height: 2000px;
        width: 2000px;
        top: -10%;
        right: 48%;
        transform: translateY(-50%);
        background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
        transition: 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1);
        border-radius: 50%;
        z-index: 5;
      }

      .panel {
        display: grid;
        place-items: center;
        text-align: center;
        z-index: 7;
      }

      .left-panel {
        pointer-events: all;
        padding: 0 12%;
      }

      .right-panel {
        pointer-events: none;
        padding: 0 12%;
      }

      .panel .content {
        color: #fff;
        width: 100%;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        grid-column: 1 / 2;
        grid-row: 1 / 2;
        pointer-events: none;
        position: relative;
        z-index: 10;
      }
      
      .left-panel .content.content-signin {
        pointer-events: all;
        z-index: 11;
      }

      .panel h3 {
        font-weight: 600;
        line-height: 1;
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .panel p {
        font-size: 0.95rem;
        padding: 0.7rem 0;
      }

      .btn.transparent {
        margin: 0;
        background: none;
        border: 2px solid #fff;
        width: 130px;
        height: 41px;
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
      }

      .btn.transparent:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        transform: translateY(-2px);
      }
      
      /* ANIMATION */
      .container.sign-up-mode:before,
      .container.forgot-password-mode:before,
      .container.two-fa-mode:before,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode:before {
        transform: translate(100%, -50%);
        right: 52%;
      }

      .container.sign-up-mode .signin-signup,
      .container.forgot-password-mode .signin-signup,
      .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .signin-signup {
        left: 25%;
      }

      .container.sign-up-mode form.sign-up-form,
      .container.forgot-password-mode form.forgot-password-form,
      .container.verify-email-mode form.verify-email-form,
      .container.two-fa-mode form.two-fa-form,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode form.two-fa-magic-link-form {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
        pointer-events: all;
        z-index: 2;
        transition-delay: 0.9s;
      }
      .container.sign-up-mode form.sign-in-form,
      .container.forgot-password-mode form.sign-in-form,
      .container.two-fa-mode form.sign-in-form,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode form.sign-in-form,
      .container.forgot-password-mode form.sign-up-form,
      .container.verify-email-mode form.sign-in-form,
      .container.verify-email-mode form.sign-up-form,
      .container.verify-email-mode form.forgot-password-form,
      .container.two-fa-mode form.sign-up-form,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode form.sign-up-form {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.95);
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 1;
        transition-delay: 0.7s;
      }

      /* Staggered animation triggers */
      .container:not(.sign-up-mode):not(.forgot-password-mode):not(.verify-email-mode):not(.two-fa-mode):not(.two-fa-magic-link-mode) .left-panel .content-signin > *,
      .container.verify-email-mode .left-panel .content-verify > *,
      .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel .content-signup > *,
      .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel .content-forgot > *,
      .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa > *,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa-magic-link > * {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
      }
      
      .container:not(.sign-up-mode):not(.forgot-password-mode):not(.verify-email-mode):not(.two-fa-mode):not(.two-fa-magic-link-mode) .left-panel .content-signin > *:nth-child(1),
      .container.verify-email-mode .left-panel .content-verify > *:nth-child(1),
      .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel .content-signup > *:nth-child(1),
      .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel .content-forgot > *:nth-child(1),
      .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa > *:nth-child(1),
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa-magic-link > *:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.8s; }

      .container:not(.sign-up-mode):not(.forgot-password-mode):not(.verify-email-mode):not(.two-fa-mode):not(.two-fa-magic-link-mode) .left-panel .content-signin > *:nth-child(2),
      .container.verify-email-mode .left-panel .content-verify > *:nth-child(2),
      .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel .content-signup > *:nth-child(2),
      .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel .content-forgot > *:nth-child(2),
      .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa > *:nth-child(2),
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa-magic-link > *:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.9s; }

      .container:not(.sign-up-mode):not(.forgot-password-mode):not(.verify-email-mode):not(.two-fa-mode):not(.two-fa-magic-link-mode) .left-panel .content-signin > *:nth-child(3),
      .container.verify-email-mode .left-panel .content-verify > *:nth-child(3),
      .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel .content-signup > *:nth-child(3),
      .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel .content-forgot > *:nth-child(3),
      .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa > *:nth-child(3),
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa-magic-link > *:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 1.0s; }


      .container.sign-up-mode .left-panel .content.content-signin,
      .container.forgot-password-mode .left-panel .content.content-signin,
      .container.two-fa-mode .left-panel .content.content-signin,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .left-panel .content.content-signin,
      .container.verify-email-mode .left-panel .content.content-signin {
        pointer-events: none;
        z-index: 10;
      }
      
      .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel .content-signup,
      .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel .content-forgot,
      .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel .content-two-fa-magic-link,
      .container.verify-email-mode .left-panel .content-verify {
        pointer-events: all;
        z-index: 11;
      }

      .container.sign-up-mode .left-panel,
      .container.forgot-password-mode .left-panel,
      .container.two-fa-mode .left-panel,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .left-panel {
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel,
      .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel,
      .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel,
      .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel {
        pointer-events: all;
      }

      @media (max-width: 870px) {
        .container {
            margin: auto; /* Safe centering: centers if space available, top-aligns if overflow */
            height: 600px; /* Slightly taller for better spacing */
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 450px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        .signin-signup {
            width: 100%;
            top: 52%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            transition: 1s 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55);
            z-index: 20 !important; /* CRITICAL: Ensure forms are above panels on mobile */
        }
        .container.sign-up-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.forgot-password-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .signin-signup { 
            top: 5%;
            transform: translate(-50%, 0); 
        }
        .signin-signup,
        .container.sign-up-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.forgot-password-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .signin-signup,
        .container.verify-email-mode .signin-signup {
            left: 50%;
        }

        .panels-container {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            grid-template-rows: 1fr 2fr 1fr;
        }
        .panel {
            padding: 1.5rem 8%; /* Reduced general padding */
            grid-column: 1 / 2;
            pointer-events: none !important; /* Disable clicks on panel background to prevent blocking form */
        }
        
        /* Specific Panel Alignment for Mobile to avoid touching the white form */
        .left-panel {
            grid-row: 1 / 2;
            align-items: flex-start; /* Pulls content to the top */
            padding-top: 3rem;       /* Adds specific top spacing */
        }
        
        .right-panel {
            grid-row: 3 / 4;
            align-items: flex-end;   /* Pulls content to the bottom */
            padding-bottom: 3rem;    /* Adds specific bottom spacing */
        }

        .panel .content {
            pointer-events: auto !important; /* Re-enable clicks only on content */
            transition: transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55);
            transition-delay: 0.6s;
        }
        
        .panel h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; }
        .panel p { font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 0.5rem 0; }
        .btn.transparent { width: 110px; height: 35px; font-size: 0.7rem; }
        
        .container:before {
            width: 1500px;
            height: 1500px;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            left: 30%;
            bottom: 68%;
            right: initial;
            top: initial;
            transition: 2s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55);
        }
        .container.sign-up-mode:before,
        .container.forgot-password-mode:before,
        .container.two-fa-mode:before,
        .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode:before {
            transform: translate(-50%, 100%);
            bottom: 32%;
            right: initial;
        }

        /* Mobile Panel Sliding Logic */
        .left-panel .content {
            transform: translateX(0px);
        }
        .right-panel .content {
            transform: translateX(800px);
        }

        .container.sign-up-mode .left-panel .content,
        .container.forgot-password-mode .left-panel .content,
        .container.two-fa-mode .left-panel .content,
        .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .left-panel .content {
            transform: translateX(-800px);
        }
        
        .container.sign-up-mode .right-panel .content,
        .container.forgot-password-mode .right-panel .content,
        .container.two-fa-mode .right-panel .content,
        .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode .right-panel .content {
            transform: translateX(0px);
        }

        .signin-signup form { padding: 0 1.5rem; }
      }
      
      @media (max-width: 570px) {
          .signin-signup form { padding: 0 1rem; }
          .panel .content { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; }
          .container { padding: 1.5rem; }
          .container:before { bottom: 72%; left: 50%; }
          .container.sign-up-mode:before,
          .container.forgot-password-mode:before,
          .container.two-fa-mode:before,
          .container.two-fa-magic-link-mode:before { bottom: 28%; left: 50%; }
          
          /* Compact form styles for small screens */
          .title { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
          .auth-input-field { margin: 0.4rem 0; }
          .auth-input-field input { height: 48px; padding-left: 1rem; }
          .auth-input-field label { left: 1rem; }
          .auth-input-field input:focus + label,
          .auth-input-field input:not(:placeholder-shown) + label { left: 0.75rem; }
          .btn { height: 44px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
          .form-options { margin: -2px 0 8px 0; font-size: 0.8rem; }
      }
      
      /* --- Brand Performance Enhancements --- */
      /* Glassmorphism for Window Headers */
      .windows > header {
        background-color: rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.6); /* slate-100 */
        backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
        border-bottom-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07);
      }
      .dark.windows > header {
          background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.6); /* slate-800 */
          border-bottom-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07);
      }
      .windows > header[style*="background-color"] {
          background-color: transparent !important;
          position: relative;
      }
      .windows > header[style*="background-color"]::before {
          content: '';
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: inherit; /* This will be the accent color from the inline style */
          opacity: 0.9; /* More saturated color for light mode for better contrast */
          backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
          z-index: -1;
      }
      .dark .windows > header[style*="background-color"]::before {
          opacity: 0.7; /* Original subtle effect for dark mode */
      }
      
      /* Window controls polish */
      .window-controls button {
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease;
      }
      .window-controls button:active:not(:disabled) {
          transform: scale(0.9);
          background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
      }
      .window-control-close:hover {
          background-color: #ef4444 !important;
          color: white;
      }
      .dark .window-controls button:active:not(:disabled) {
          background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
      }
      
      /* --- Microchip Loader Animation --- */
      :root {
        --loader-hue: 239;
        /* Light mode colors */
        --loader-primary3: hsl(var(--loader-hue), 85%, 60%);
        --loader-primary7: hsl(var(--loader-hue), 85%, 40%);
        --loader-trans-dur: 0.3s;
      }
      .dark {
          /* Dark mode colors */
          --loader-primary3: hsl(var(--loader-hue), 85%, 70%);
          --loader-primary7: hsl(var(--loader-hue), 85%, 30%);
      }
      .microchip {
        display: block;
        margin: auto;
        width: 8em;
        height: auto;
        color: var(--loader-primary3);
      }
      .microchip__center, .microchip__dot, .microchip__line, .microchip__lines, .microchip__spark, .microchip__wave {
        animation-duration: 5s;
        animation-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1);
        animation-iteration-count: infinite;
      }
      .microchip__core, .microchip__dot {
        fill: var(--loader-primary7);
        transition: fill var(--loader-trans-dur);
      }
      .microchip__center, .microchip__wave {
        transform-origin: 25px 25px;
      }
      .microchip__center {
        animation-name: center-scale;
      }
      .microchip__dot--1 {
        animation-name: dot-scale1;
        transform-origin: 3px 38px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--2 {
        animation-name: dot-scale2;
        transform-origin: 3px 54px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--3 {
        animation-name: dot-scale3;
        transform-origin: 3px 70px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--4 {
        animation-name: dot-scale4;
        transform-origin: 3px 3px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--5 {
        animation-name: dot-scale5;
        transform-origin: 20px 3px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--6 {
        animation-name: dot-scale6;
        transform-origin: 3px 30px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--7 {
        animation-name: dot-scale7;
        transform-origin: 37px 3px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--8 {
        animation-name: dot-scale8;
        transform-origin: 54px 3px;
      }
      .microchip__dot--9 {
        animation-name: dot-scale9;
        transform-origin: 71px 3px;
      }
      .microchip__line, .microchip__spark, .microchip__wave {
        transition: stroke var(--loader-trans-dur);
      }
      .microchip__line {
        stroke: var(--loader-primary7);
      }
      .microchip__line--1 { animation-name: line-draw1; }

    <style>
      /* --- Responsive Enhancements & Media Queries --- */
      
      /* 1. Responsive Base Typography */
      html {
        font-size: 14px; /* Base for small screens */
      }
      @media (min-width: 768px) { /* Tablets */
        html {
          font-size: 15px;
        }
      }
      @media (min-width: 1024px) { /* Desktops */
        html {
          font-size: 16px;
        }
      }

      /* 3. Responsive Admin Dashboard Table */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .responsive-admin-table {
            border: 0;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        .responsive-admin-table thead {
            display: none;
        }
        /* Card container for each user */
        .responsive-admin-table tr {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            background-color: #fff;
            border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px */
            box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.07), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; /* slate-200 */
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table tr {
            background-color: #1e293b; /* slate-800 */
            border-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
        }

        /* All cells become flex rows */
        .responsive-admin-table td {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; /* slate-100 */
            min-height: 52px;
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td {
            border-bottom-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
        }
        .responsive-admin-table tr td:last-child {
            border-bottom: 0;
        }
        
        /* Style the 'User' cell as a card header */
        .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"] {
            background-color: #f8fafc; /* slate-50 */
            border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            justify-content: flex-start; /* Align user info to the left */
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"] {
            background-color: #334155; /* slate-700 */
            border-bottom-color: #475569; /* slate-600 */
        }
        
        /* The label is the '::before' pseudo-element */
        .responsive-admin-table td::before {
            content: attr(data-label);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #475569; /* slate-600 */
        }
        .dark .responsive-admin-table td::before {
            color: #94a3b8; /* slate-400 */
        }

        /* Remove the label for the header cell */
        .responsive-admin-table td[data-label="User"]::before {
            content: none;
        }
      }
    </style>
     <style>
      /* --- Notes Page --- */
      .notes-bg-pattern {
        background-image:
          radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 0, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 100%);
        background-size: 1rem 1rem;
      }
      .note-textarea {
        font-family: 'Kalam', cursive;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      :root {
        --note-color-yellow: #fef08a;
        --note-color-pink: #fbcfe8;
        --note-color-blue: #bfdbfe;
        --note-color-green: #bbf7d0;
        --note-color-purple: #e9d5ff;
      }
      .dark {
        --note-color-yellow: #a16207;
        --note-color-pink: #9d174d;
        --note-color-blue: #1e40af;
        --note-color-green: #166534;
        --note-color-purple: #5b21b6;
      }

      /* --- Todolist Page --- */
      .todolist-item.completed {
        opacity: 0.6;
      }
      .todolist-checkbox-wrapper {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        cursor: pointer;
        -webkit-user-select: none;
        -moz-user-select: none;
        user-select: none;
      }
      .todolist-checkbox {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        border: 2px solid #9ca3af; /* slate-400 */
        border-radius: 6px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
      }
      .dark .todolist-checkbox {
        border-color: #64748b; /* slate-500 */
      }
      .todolist-checkbox-wrapper input:checked + .todolist-checkbox {
        background-color: #4ade80; /* green-400 */
        border-color: #4ade80;
      }
      .todolist-checkbox svg {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
        stroke: white;
        stroke-width: 3;
        stroke-dasharray: 24;
        stroke-dashoffset: 24;
        transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) 0.1s;
      }
      .todolist-checkbox-wrapper input:checked + .todolist-checkbox svg {
        stroke-dashoffset: 0;
      }
    </style>
    <style>
      /* --- Deletion Animation --- */
      .deletion-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        background-color: #000;
        z-index: 10000;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
        color: #4ade80; /* green-400 */
      }
      .terminal-logs {
        width: 90%;
        max-width: 600px;
        max-height: 90vh;
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 1rem;
      }
      .log-entry {
        margin: 0;
        line-height: 1.5;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        opacity: 0;
        animation: fadeIn 0.3s forwards;
      }

      @keyframes fadeIn {
        from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(5px); }
        to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
      }

      .blinking-cursor {
        font-weight: bold;
        animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
      }

      @keyframes blink {
        from, to { color: transparent; }
        50% { color: #4ade80; }
      }
      
      @keyframes glitch-anim {
        0% { transform: translate(0); }
        20% { transform: translate(-3px, 3px); }
        40% { transform: translate(3px, -3px); }
        60% { transform: translate(-3px, -3px); }
        80% { transform: translate(3px, 3px); }
        100% { transform: translate(0); }
      }

      .glitch-effect {
        animation: glitch-anim .2s infinite;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .glitch-effect::before,
      .glitch-effect::after {
        content: ' ';
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: black;
        opacity: 0.8;
      }

      @keyframes glitch-lines {
        0% { clip-path: inset(40% 0 40% 0); }
        20% { clip-path: inset(10% 0 70% 0); }
        40% { clip-path: inset(60% 0 10% 0); }
        60% { clip-path: inset(30% 0 50% 0); }
        80% { clip-path: inset(50% 0 20% 0); }
        100% { clip-path: inset(40% 0 40% 0); }
      }

      .glitch-effect::before {
        animation: glitch-lines .5s infinite;
        transform: translate(10px, 5px);
        mix-blend-mode: color-dodge;
        background: #ff00c1;
      }

      .glitch-effect::after {
        animation: glitch-lines .3s infinite;
        transform: translate(-10px, -5px);
        mix-blend-mode: color-dodge;
        background: #00ffc1;
      }
    </style>
     <style>
      /* --- Support Bot Styles --- */
      .support-bot-fab {
        position: fixed;
        bottom: 2rem;
        right: 2rem;
        z-index: 9999;
        transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
      }
      .support-bot-window {
        position: fixed;
        bottom: 2rem;
        right: 2rem;
        z-index: 9999;
        width: 90vw;
        max-width: 380px;
        height: 70vh;
        max-height: 500px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1);
        transform-origin: bottom right;
      }
      @media (max-width: 640px) {
        .support-bot-window {
          bottom: 1rem;
          right: 1rem;
          left: 1rem;
          width: auto;
          max-width: none;
        }
        .support-bot-fab {
          bottom: 1rem;
          right: 1rem;
        }
      }
      .bot-message {
        align-self: flex-start;
        background-color: #e5e7eb; /* gray-200 */
      }
      .dark .bot-message {
        background-color: #4b5563; /* gray-600 */
      }
      .user-message {
        align-self: flex-end;
        background-color: #6366f1; /* indigo-500 */
        color: white;
      }

      @keyframes fab-pop-in {
        from { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; }
        to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
      }
      .animate-fab-pop-in {
        animation: fab-pop-in 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) 0.5s forwards;
      }

      @keyframes window-slide-up {
        from { transform: translateY(50px) scale(0.9); opacity: 0; }
        to { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
      }
      .animate-window-slide-up {
        animation: window-slide-up 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1) forwards;
      }
    </style>
    <style>
      /* --- Animated Gradient Background --- */
      .animated-gradient-background {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        z-index: -1; /* Behind all content */
        --gradient-color-1: #3b82f6; /* blue-500 */
        --gradient-color-2: #8b5cf6; /* violet-500 */
        --gradient-color-3: #4f46e5; /* indigo-600 */
        --gradient-color-4: #a855f7; /* purple-500 */
        background: linear-gradient(
          -45deg,
          var(--gradient-color-1),
          var(--gradient-color-2),
          var(--gradient-color-3),
          var(--gradient-color-4)
        );
        background-size: 400% 400%;
        animation: gradient-flow 15s ease infinite;
      }
      
      .dark .animated-gradient-background {
        --gradient-color-1: #1e3a8a; /* blue-800 */
        --gradient-color-2: #5b21b6; /* violet-700 */
        --gradient-color-3: #312e81; /* indigo-800 */
        --gradient-color-4: #6b21a8; /* purple-700 */
      }

      @keyframes gradient-flow {
        0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
        50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
      }
    </style>

  <body>
    <div id="root"></div>
    <!-- 
      Auth Bootloader: This script runs BEFORE the main React app.
      It handles magic link verification and ensures the user is authenticated
      before the main application logic begins, preventing race conditions.
    -->
    <script type="module">
      import { initializeApp, getApps, getApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-app.js";
      import { getAuth, signInWithCustomToken, isSignInWithEmailLink, signInWithEmailLink } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.2/firebase-auth.js";

      const firebaseConfig = {
        apiKey: "AIzaSyBVlOhHgVqBefjb-XKBX6RP39j--jr-0uI",
        authDomain: "bug-portal-htwth.firebaseapp.com",
        projectId: "bug-portal-htwth",
        storageBucket: "bug-portal-htwth.firebasestorage.app",
        messagingSenderId: "219136546989",
        appId: "1:219136546989:web:e43c0bf77f7b08132b8e24",
        measurementId: "G-V7PJ97LWJ8"
      };

      const showVerifyingScreen = () => {
        const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
        if (rootEl) {
          rootEl.innerHTML = `
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:100vh; font-family:sans-serif; background-color:#0f172a; color:white; text-align: center; padding: 1rem;">
              <p>🔐 Verifying your secure login link...</p>
            </div>
          `;
        }
      };
      
      const loadMainApp = () => {
        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.type = 'module';
        script.src = './index.tsx';
        document.body.appendChild(script);
      };

      const handleAuthAndLoadApp = async () => {
        showVerifyingScreen();
        const hash = window.location.hash;
        const currentUrl = window.location.href;

        // --- Flow 1: Custom Token from 2FA ---
        if (hash.startsWith("#/auth/verify-link")) {
            console.log("🔑 2FA Magic link detected.");
            try {
                const params = new URLSearchParams(hash.split("?")[1]);
                const token = params.get("token");

                if (token) {
                    await signInWithCustomToken(auth, token);
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isNewLogin', 'true');
                    console.log("✅ 2FA login successful. Setting hash to home.");
                    // Set the hash. The main app will load and see the user is
                    // authenticated and on the correct route.
                    window.location.hash = '#/home';
                } else {
                    console.warn("⚠️ Path is for verify-link, but no token found.");
                    window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error("❌ 2FA magic link error:", err);
                alert("2FA login link failed or expired. Please try again.");
                window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
            }
        }
        // --- Flow 2: Standard Firebase Email Link ---
        else if (isSignInWithEmailLink(auth, currentUrl)) {
            console.log("🔑 Firebase Email link detected.");
            let email = window.localStorage.getItem("magic_email");
            if (!email) {
                email = window.prompt("Please provide your email for confirmation");
            }

            if (email) {
                try {
                    await signInWithEmailLink(auth, email, currentUrl);
                    window.localStorage.removeItem("magic_email");
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isNewLogin', 'true');
                    console.log("✅ Firebase Email link login successful. Setting hash to home.");
                    window.location.hash = '#/home';
                } catch (err) {
                    console.error("❌ Firebase Email link error:", err);
                    alert("Login failed. The link may be invalid or expired. Please request a new one.");
                    window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
                }
            } else {
                alert("Could not complete login: email is missing.");
                window.location.hash = "/#/auth";
            }
        }
        
        loadMainApp();
      };
      
      // --- Execution Logic ---
      // Initialize Firebase immediately to check for email link.
      const app = getApps().length > 0 ? getApp() : initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
      const auth = getAuth(app);
      
      const isAuthRoute = window.location.hash.startsWith("#/auth/verify-link") || isSignInWithEmailLink(auth, window.location.href);

      if (isAuthRoute) {
          handleAuthAndLoadApp();
      } else {
          loadMainApp();
      }
    </script>
    <!-- The main app script is now loaded dynamically by the script above -->
  </body>
</html>

payload.text: <!-- Fix for App.tsx: Removed the `declare global` block that was overwriting the global JSX.IntrinsicElements namespace, causing all standard HTML tags (div, span, etc.) to be unrecognized by TypeScript.
